mapper.sql: select ca.*, c.category_name, c.category_name as source_category_name, a.attribute_code, a.attribute_name, a.attribute_type, a.option_source, a.dict_type, a.unit from product_category_attribute ca left join product_category c on c.category_id = ca.category_id left join product_attribute a on a.attribute_id = ca.attribute_id
exists ( select 1 from product_category ap where ap.del_flag = '0' and ap.status = '1' and find_in_set(ap.category_id, c.ancestors) > 0 )

select c.category_id, c.parent_id, c.ancestors, c.category_code, c.category_name, c.category_level, ( select group_concat(p.category_name order by find_in_set(p.category_id, concat(c.ancestors, ',', c.category_id)) separator ' / ') from product_category p where p.del_flag = '0' and find_in_set(p.category_id, concat(c.ancestors, ',', c.category_id)) ) as full_path, case when ifnull(child.children_count, 0) > 0 then 'N' else 'Y' end as publish_enabled, c.sort_order, c.schema_version, c.status, case when then '1' else '0' end as effective_status, case when c.status = '0' and then 1 else 0 end as disabled_by_ancestor, c.del_flag, ifnull(child.children_count, 0) as children_count, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark from product_category c left join ( select parent_id, count(1) as children_count from product_category where del_flag = '0' group by parent_id ) child on child.parent_id = c.category_id
mapper.select:
where c.del_flag = '0'
and ( c.category_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or c.category_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or exists ( select 1 from product_category p where p.del_flag = '0' and find_in_set(p.category_id, c.ancestors) and ( p.category_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.category_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ) )
and c.category_code like concat('%', #{categoryCode}, '%')
and c.category_name like concat('%', #{categoryName}, '%')
and c.parent_id = #{parentId}
and c.category_level = #{categoryLevel}
and c.status = #{status}
and not
and
and ifnull(child.children_count, 0) = 0
and ifnull(child.children_count, 0) = 0
and ifnull(child.children_count, 0) > 0
order by c.parent_id asc, c.sort_order asc, c.category_id asc
select count(1) from product_category where parent_id = #{categoryId} and del_flag = '0'
select category_id from product_category where del_flag = '0' and (category_id = #{categoryId} or find_in_set(#{categoryId}, ancestors) > 0) order by category_level asc, category_id asc
mapper.update: update product_category set parent_id = #{parentId}, ancestors = #{ancestors}, category_code = #{categoryCode}, category_name = #{categoryName}, category_level = #{categoryLevel}, publish_enabled = #{publishEnabled}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, schema_version = #{schemaVersion}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where category_id = #{categoryId} and del_flag = '0'
update product_category set publish_enabled = #{publishEnabled}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where category_id = #{categoryId} and del_flag = '0'
update product_category set del_flag = '2', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where category_id = #{categoryId} and del_flag = '0'
update product_category set schema_version = schema_version + 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where category_id = #{categoryId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select:
select * from product_attribute where del_flag = '0' and status = '0'
and (attribute_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or attribute_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and attribute_code like concat('%', #{attributeCode}, '%')
and attribute_name like concat('%', #{attributeName}, '%')
and attribute_type = #{attributeType}
order by attribute_name asc, attribute_id asc
select * from product_attribute where attribute_id = #{attributeId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select * from product_attribute where attribute_code = #{attributeCode} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.update: update product_attribute set attribute_code = #{attributeCode}, attribute_name = #{attributeName}, attribute_type = #{attributeType}, option_source = #{optionSource}, dict_type = #{dictType}, unit = #{unit}, value_precision = #{valuePrecision}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where attribute_id = #{attributeId} and del_flag = '0'
update product_attribute set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where attribute_id = #{attributeId} and del_flag = '0'
update product_attribute set del_flag = '2', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where attribute_id = #{attributeId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select distinct category_id from product_category_attribute where attribute_id = #{attributeId} order by category_id asc
select * from product_attribute_option where attribute_id = #{attributeId} order by sort_order asc, option_id asc
select * from product_attribute_option where option_id = #{optionId} limit 1
mapper.update: update product_attribute_option set option_code = #{optionCode}, option_label = #{optionLabel}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, default_flag = #{defaultFlag}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where option_id = #{optionId} and attribute_id = #{attributeId}
mapper.select: where ca.category_id = #{categoryId} order by ca.sort_order asc, ca.category_attribute_id asc
where ca.category_attribute_id = #{categoryAttributeId} limit 1

where ca.status = '0' and a.status = '0' and a.del_flag = '0' and c.status = '0' and c.del_flag = '0' and ca.category_id in
#{categoryId}
mapper.update: update product_category_attribute set rule_mode = #{ruleMode}, required_flag = #{requiredFlag}, visible_flag = #{visibleFlag}, editable_flag = #{editableFlag}, filterable_flag = #{filterableFlag}, group_code = #{groupCode}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, placeholder = #{placeholder}, help_text = #{helpText}, validation_rule = #{validationRule}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where category_attribute_id = #{categoryAttributeId}
